title: [WIP] List all repos with tags
body:
Add the ability to list all repos and tags in a registry with the `list` subcommand.  This could also be used as a precursor for registry search.

Some items still in progress:
- Documentation
- Error handling
- Formatting of output - long repo names and tag slices can overwhelm Stdout as is
- Architecture of helper struct/methods currently in registry_utils.go - I chose to break this out from utils.go due to the size of the added content and specific application to registries
- Consider utilizing docker libs for auth - though it appears easier to re-write as I have done, but still prefer to rely on existing libs if possible

comments.body:
@danielorf did you check containers/image? It already support searching repositories, which podman-search is using. I am not sure if the proposed list command is something for skopeo given search is implemented in Podman.

@rhatdan @mtrmac @baude @mheon WDYT?
@vrothberg I wasn't aware of this feature in containers/image.  The skopeo [TODO list](https://github.com/containers/skopeo#todo) also adds to the confusion since it lists this as a wanted feature.

@danielorf, good point! I am open to add search and list to Skopeo. Some users might use Skopeo in isolation without Podman and supporting that would give flexibility.

Regarding this particular PR: the low-level plumbing should happen in c/image, and much is already in place. A good starting point could be [libpod's search implementation](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/libpod/image/search.go).
I think it makes sense to add SEARCH/List to skopeo.  Any interactions with a container registry would make sense.
@danielorf Are you still working on this one?
Yes I am still working on the registry listing feature, but I'm going to approach this from containers/image as @mtrmac suggests.  So It makes sense to close this PR.
